name: Cheese Soup

ingredients.item: carrots / 2 celery stalks I 2 medium onions I 2 cloves of garlic I 8
cups cauliflower florets I olive oil I 1:X quarts chicken or vegetable
Cheddar cheese I , teaspoon English mustard I optional:

method: heat until boiling. Put a large saucepan on a medium heat and
add 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Add all your chopped and sliced
ingredients and mix together with a wooden spoon. Cook for
around 10 minutes with the lid askew, until the carrots have
softened but are still holding their shape, and the onion is lightly
Grate the Cheddar into a bowl and put to one side for
later. Add the boiling broth to the vegetables. Give the soup
a good stir and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for
Remove the pan from the heat. Season with salt and pepper and
the cheese and mustard • Using an immersion blender or
liquidizer, pulse the soup until Silky smooth • Divide between
your serving bowls and grate over some nutmeg, if you like •
topped with some lightly fried crispy bacon, or see page
141 for some other great soup topping ideas
